purpose: Top-level Electron architecture overview: process model (main/renderer/worker), preload bridge security model (contextIsolation, no nodeIntegration), service layer organization, app:// protocol, and end-to-end data flow examples for swarm dispatch and dashboard updates.
gotchas: Worker child processes are killed on window-all-closed — long jobs must persist via files
Renderer has no direct ipcRenderer access; everything is proxied via preload
patterns: Main delegates business logic to services/
Two communication modes: push events vs pull invokes
Process-per-task spawning model for CLI workers
conventions: electron/ contains main.js, preload.js, ipc-handlers.js, services/
